---
id: setup
type: setup
tags: [setup, environment]
created: [DATE]
updated: "[DATETIME]"
version: 1.0
priority: medium
status: active
summary: "Environment and setup details"
---

# Setup

## Hardware

- **Machine:** [e.g., RTX 5070 Ti, 32GB RAM]
- **OS:** [e.g., Linux 6.17, Ubuntu 24.04]

## Software

- **Agent Platform:** [e.g., Claude Code, Custom]
- **Node.js:** [Version]
- **Python:** [Version]

## Services

| Service | Port | Status |
|---------|------|--------|
| Neo4j | 7687 | [Running/Manual] |
| Ollama | 11434 | [Running/Manual] |

## Models

| Model | Size | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| [model-name] | [size] | [usage] |

## Key Paths

| Purpose | Path |
|---------|------|
| Workspace | `~/.ai-memory/` |
| Memory | `~/.ai-memory/memory/` |
| Scripts | `~/.ai-memory/scripts/` |
| Neo4j venv | `~/.ai-memory/neo4j-venv/` |

---

_Update as environment changes._
